<file>
00001| // The Alchemy hooks in the codebase automatically filter out these spam tokens
00002| 
00003| import { Network } from "../config";
00004| import { INITIAL_SPAM_TOKENS } from "./initial-spam-tokens";
00005| import { ADDITIONAL_SPAM_TOKENS } from "./additional-spam-tokens";
00006| 
00007| export const isSpamToken = (network: Network, address?: string | null) => {
00008|   if (!address) return false;
00009| 
00010|   if (network == Network.MATIC_MAINNET_OLD) {
00011|     network = Network.MATIC_MAINNET
00012|   }
00013|   
00014|   return INITIAL_SPAM_TOKENS[network]?.[address.toLowerCase()] 
00015|     || ADDITIONAL_SPAM_TOKENS[network]?.[address.toLowerCase()];
00016| };
</file>
